a.xlink:title: Implementation of the sampletracer class for parallel data processing.
Defines the notification class for logging and messaging functionality.
Handles metadata operations and provides utilities for managing metadata-related tasks.
Defines the tools class that provides general utility functions for the AnalysisG framework.
Defines the graph_template class and graph_t structure for graph-based analysis.
Defines the base template class for event data representation and manipulation.
Defines the selection_template base class for event selection criteria.
Defines metadata structures for physics analysis datasets.
Defines the cproperty template class for property-based access patterns.
Defines the particle_template base class for physics particle representations.
Defines fundamental data structures and type handling for the AnalysisG framework.
Defines the settings_t structure for global configuration of the AnalysisG framework.
